verdict.answer_first: B: first line gives the bottom line, "server didn't match what it rendered on the client," then immediately moves to causes; A also does this but adds extra mechanism detail before causes.
verdict.decisiveness: B: still surveys causes, but gives a clearer diagnostic path: "The fastest way to find it"; A lists "Typical fixes" with more options.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on: "warning usually points at the offending element" plus two fixes; A has more complete examples but less priority.
